rules.name: Allow NPM Registry
rules.description: Allow access to NPM registry and related services
rules.traffic: dns_domains contains 'registry.npmjs.org' or dns_domains contains 'registry.yarnpkg.com' or dns_domains contains 'npmjs.com' or dns_domains contains 'yarnpkg.com'

rules.name: Allow OpenAI API
rules.description: Allow access to OpenAI API endpoints

rules.name: Allow Cloudflare API
rules.description: Allow access to Cloudflare API and Worker services
rules.traffic: dns_domains contains 'cloudflare.com' or dns_domains contains 'workers.dev' or dns_domains contains 'cloudflareclient.com'
